market_rules:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald J. Trump wins the 2024 US Presidential Election. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

The resolution source for this market is the Associated Press, Fox News, and NBC. This market will resolve once all three sources call the race for the same candidate. If all three sources haven’t called the race for the same candidate by the inauguration date (January 20, 2025) this market will resolve based on who is inaugurated.

Trump gives a keynote speech at the Bitcoin 2024 conference in Nashville on July 27, 2024. Bitcoin has surged since Trump's election amid hopes he will usher in an administration friendly to its interests.

Jon Cherry/Getty Images

****hide caption****

Jon Cherry/Getty Images
Bitcoin hit $100,000 for the first time on Wednesday, a remarkable milestone for a cryptocurrency created over 15 years ago from what was essentially computer coding created under mysterious circumstances.
[![Former President Donald Trump speaks during a rally in Richmond, Virginia, on March 2.]] 
### [Economy ] 
### [Here's what Trump 2.0 means for the economy, from tariffs to mass deportations] 
The surge has been nothing short of spectacular. The value of bitcoin has more than doubled this year, turbocharged by the election of Donald Trump.

![Will Bitcoin make it to $200?] Bitcoin Can Make It To $200: Matt Hougan

[google-news-img] 

[![Maxwell Mutuma]] 

By [Maxwell Mutuma] 

October 17, 2024 2:29 pm EDT

[Subscribe] 

# Bitwise’s Matt Hougan Sees Bitcoin Peaking at $200K by 2025

- Matt Hougan, Bitwise CIO, predicts Bitcoin will reach $200,000 by 2025.
- Hougan believes the 2024 U.S. elections will positively impact Bitcoin regardless of the winner.
- Investors are waiting for political and regulatory clarity before fully committing to Bitcoin.

The chief investment officer at Bitwise, Matt Hougan, has predicted a huge rise in the price of [Bitcoin (BTC)] by 2025. According to Hougan, Bitcoin will reach an all-time high and hit $200,000, all based on several key factors.

Regardless of the winner, the 2024 U.S. presidential elections could be good for Bitcoin, Hougan told Reuters. According to him, Donald Trump or a neutral stance from Kamala Harris could positively impact the cryptocurrency market, and he suggested a pro-crypto administra

# Bitwise’s Matt Hougan Predicts Bitcoin Could Hit $200,000 by 2025
[Prefer us on Google] 
![Bitwise&#8217;s Matt Hougan Predicts Bitcoin Could Hit $200,000 by 2025] 
![author avatar] 
Written by
[Nhat Hoang] 
![editor avatar] 
Edited by
[Harsh Notariya] 
17 October 202408:19 UTC
* Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan predicts Bitcoin could reach $200,000 by 2025, citing political, financial, and ETF factors.
* Hougan expects sidelined capital and political clarity to drive major investment into Bitcoin within the next few years.
* He also sees long-term growth potential for Bitcoin ETFs, drawing comparisons to gold ETFs' early success.

agent_action.reasoning: Recent news indicates Bitcoin has reached $100k, driven by a pro-crypto sentiment following Trump's election. This aligns with the market resolution rules, suggesting a higher probability of a 'Yes' outcome. However, the current market price of 0.62 is close to my belief probability of 0.65, providing limited expected value for additional buying. Therefore, I will hold my current position.
